sourcePrompt: An LCM-8 "Mike Boat" mechanized landing craft, about twenty-two meters of rectangular steel box. A tall flat bow ramp leans back against the front, ribbed and hinged at the deck line; high slab side walls run straight aft framing an open cargo well big enough for a vehicle; at the stern a small blocky pilothouse rises with a rail and an exhaust stack. Everything is welded plate at right angles. Olive-gray steel, blunt and industrial.
